definition: Model output contains a claim not entailed by provided context
example_application: Participant described model fabricating legal citations

definition: Difficulty determining acceptable metric value for domain
example_application: Participant described ad hoc threshold setting process

definition: Inability to provide interpretable reasoning for model output
example_application: Participant described audit trail existing but unusable

definition: Quality degradation following prompt change
example_application: Participant described accuracy drop after minor wording change

definition: Current QA tooling insufficient for LLM-specific failure modes
example_application: Participant stated unit tests pass but hallucinations go undetected

definition: Quality evaluation performed without systematic framework
example_application: Team relies on manual spot-checks and user complaints

definition: Excessive number of metrics without clear priority or aggregation
example_application: Participant listed 15+ metrics tracked with no composite score

definition: Standard benchmarks do not reflect production quality concerns
example_application: High HELM scores but poor user satisfaction in production

definition: Retrieval-augmented system cites incorrect or non-existent source
example_application: Customer support bot cited non-existent policy clause

definition: Model asserts fabricated facts with high apparent confidence
example_application: Medical assistant stated incorrect drug dosage without uncertainty

definition: Model uses knowledge beyond provided context inappropriately
example_application: Document QA system answered from training data not the uploaded doc

definition: Model generates outdated or time-inconsistent information
example_application: System cited regulations superseded two years prior

definition: Insufficient logging to reconstruct model decision path
example_application: Could not determine which prompt version caused incident

definition: User confidence in system decreases due to opaque outputs
example_application: Users stopped using recommendations they could not verify

definition: System cannot produce explanations meeting regulatory requirements
example_application: EU AI Act high-risk classification requires explainability not implemented

definition: Engineering team cannot diagnose failure without explanation
example_application: Root cause analysis required manual inspection of 10K logs

definition: Over-reliance on single LLM provider creates availability risk
example_application: GPT-4 outage caused complete product unavailability for 4 hours

definition: Response latency exceeds user experience threshold
example_application: P95 latency spikes to 8s during peak load; threshold is 2s

definition: API cost increases without corresponding quality improvement
example_application: Moved to GPT-4 at 10x cost; quality improvement not measurable

definition: LLM integration not tested as component boundary
example_application: Unit tests pass; integration fails due to context window truncation

definition: Industry-specific acceptable quality differs from generic defaults
example_application: Medical team required 99%+ factual precision vs 85% default

definition: Acceptable quality thresholds change as system matures or regulations evolve
example_application: EU AI Act passage required immediate threshold review

definition: No established industry baseline for LLM quality metrics
example_application: Could not determine if 0.87 faithfulness score is good or bad

definition: Quality degradation from minor prompt wording changes
example_application: Changing 'respond concisely' to 'be brief' increased hallucination rate

definition: No systematic tracking of prompt template changes
example_application: Team had no record of which prompt version was live during incident

definition: Prompts tuned for one model degrade on another
example_application: GPT-4 optimised prompt failed on Claude deployment

definition: Healthcare data privacy requirements impose strict quality constraints
example_application: PHI in model output triggered mandatory breach notification

definition: Evolving AI regulation creates compliance ambiguity
example_application: High-risk classification unclear; team implemented precautionary measures

definition: Cannot produce machine-readable audit evidence for regulators
example_application: Financial regulator requested model decision logs; none existed

definition: Quality monitoring requires integrating many disparate tools
example_application: Team used Prometheus, Datadog, custom NLI scripts, and spreadsheets
